title: How to Make Your AI Agents Work Better (With Context Hygiene)
summary: Jordan Urbs presents context hygiene as a technique for maintaining AI agent performance across multiple messages and conversations. The approach involves three layers, Skills, Harnesses, and Hygiene, along with practices like lazy loading and multi-agent orchestration to keep context windows clean and avoid re-explaining requirements.
